SUBJECT: Last Chance at Dan Kennedy...

<firstname>

Tonight at midnight Dan Kennedy is going away for
good...

Let me explain - we have included an amazing bonus
in our new Creating Copy That Sells course... it's
a live teleseminar with Dan Kennedy. 

Dan will be covering "The Hidden Psychology of
Copy That Sells", and this is truly ground-
breaking material. This is the thing that will
take your copy from being "good enough" and
"workmanlike" and instantly vault it into a
polished selling machine.

Dan has only covered this topic once before - it
was at a live seminar, and his talk left the room
absolutely buzzing with energy. Now, for this
teleseminar Dan has further refined this material,
and it will be even more powerful.

Unfortunately, we have a deadline here. You have
to enroll in "Creating Copy That Sells" by TONIGHT
at midnight eastern time to qualify for this
bonus. To learn more, go here:
